sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n72363" key="oi)koskopiko/n" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">οἰκο-σκοπικόν</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n72363.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">observation of an omen at home, An.Ox.</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0014.tlg004.perseus-grc1:240" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.240</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
